title: bridge-jmap email_get ignores maxObjectsInGet; drops all messages on JMAP server cap
description: email_get sends all up to 50 new IDs in a single Email/get request. JMAP servers may advertise a maxObjectsInGet capability (e.g. 10). A server with maxObjectsInGet < 50 returns a requestTooLarge error response; the error is propagated as email_get failure and all new messages are lost for that poll cycle with only a WARN log.
